item.title: Efficient Deep Neural Network Training with a Novel 5.3-bit Block Floating Point Data Format
item.description: Citation: Efficient Deep Neural Network Training with a Novel 5.3-bit Block Floating Point Data Format. M. H. Sadi, C. Sudarshan, S. Nassif, N. Wehn. Accepted for Publication, IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Artificial Intelligence. https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10878478

item.title: HLS4PC: A Parametrizable Framework For Accelerating Point-Based 3D Point Cloud Models on FPGA
item.description: Citation: HLS4PC: A Parametrizable Framework For Accelerating Point-Based 3D Point Cloud Models on FPGA A. S. Pal, M. M. Ghaffar, F. Shafait, C. Weis, N. Wehn. International Conference on Embedded Computer Systems: Architectures, Modeling and Simulation (SAMOS XXV). June 28 - July 3, 2025. Accepted for publication by 25th International Conference on Embedded Computer Systems: Architectures, Modeling and Simulation (SAMOS 2025) https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.22139
